comments.author: Carlos Blauth
comments.body: Hey  @@Mike Pett  it should all be sorted, apart from the pre filled password. As our sign in modal is not rendered when the page loads (its rendered dynamically when the user clicks), the browser cannot auto fill the password. To change that we would need a bit of investigation as a possible solution could affect CWV performance. The username is prefilled because we store it in a cookie.

comments.author: Mike Pett
comments.body: Signed off from product

comments.author: Mike Pett
comments.body: Hi  @@Carlos Blauth , looks good. four points from me however: When I log out and go to log in again, if I’ve used email previously I would want the previous details to already be in the box so I can just click sign in. At the moment, I have two additional clicks that are not needed as most of the time I would want to use my old details. NB. I don’t know whether this is something we control or if it a browser setting. (In the video) We need a star next to ‘Join 400k members getting 10 free spins’ message so it is clear as to what the disclaimer below is referring to. This star should be the top right of the message.  When I log out, the button in the top right says sign up. But we already know that this is a signed up user so this should say sign in, and the sign in modal should be present on click not the sign up modal. Looking to avoid unnecessary clicks. Note this is a wider change, so if a big change we will need a separate ticket. (In the video) The link post sign up should be to the Additional Details tab not the Profile Details tab as this is what gets the user chips and it’s valuable info for us.

comments.author: Kelvin Yee
comments.body: @@Robin John   @@Shane McGrath  Ready for QA on  qa10.gambling.com . All offer components on the site should have scrollable T&C unless specified in this  site variable . There’s 3 brand added for testing, feel free to add more for your own testing. Once you made a change to the site variable, please load  https://qa10.gambling.com/clear-cache  before you test again as the site variable is cached. On release day, all brands will be removed apart from Bet365. You can roam around qa10 to check but here’s some links where I was testing for specific components: Primary oplist =>  https://qa10.gambling.com/uk/online-casinos Subprimary oplist =>  https://qa10.gambling.com/component-test-page  (added a test component at bottom of page) Secondary oplist =>  https://qa10.gambling.com/component-test-page  (added a test component at bottom of page) Brand review (geos without region) =>  https://qa10.gambling.com/uk/online-casinos/bet365 Brand review (geos with region) =>  https://qa10.gambling.com/us/online-casinos/bet365-casino  (remember to test in mobile where there’s the sticky version) Dev Notes Site variable is cached so should not have performance issue. Test publishes done and no issue. Clean up  site variable  before release day so that only Bet365 is left.

comments.author: Sanja Budic
comments.body: Completed, changes are deployed to  https://qa16.gambling.com/ace Tips for these leagues were in the database, but search patterns for league names were not set up. New patterns: England - League 1 and 2  league 1, english league 1, league 2, english league 2 Spain - La Liga 2 la liga 2, spanish la liga 2, segunda división Germany - Bundesliga 2 bundesliga 2, 2. bundesliga, 2 bundesliga, german bundesliga 2 Italy - Serie B serie b, italian serie b, italy serie b Belgium - Pro League challenger pro league, belgium challenger pro league, belgian challenger pro league Greece - Super League greek super league, greece super league Peru - Primera Division primera division, peru primera division, peruvian primera division, peru liga 1, peruvian liga 1, liga 1 India - Super League indian super league, india super league, isl Australia - A-League a-league, a league, australia a-league, australian a-league Note: We don’t get matches (odds or tips) for  Belgium Pro League ,  @@Karl O'Brien  is checking.  Also changed: event timestamp and timezone on odds and tips cards to show user local time and timezone detect search response limit from user query (default 5, now detects limit from queries like 3 best offers, 10 accumulators…)
